title: Hurricane│颶風
description: Breeze will shoot more Wind Charges at a time, and when a Wind Charge hits a creature, it will gain a wind net that provides defense and healing.│旋風使者會一次發射更多風彈，當風彈擊中生物時，它會獲得一層能提供防禦和治療的風網。
body:
# Function│功能
- Breeze projects 8 Wind Charges at a time, with an additional deflection angle of -16 to 16 degrees.│旋風使者發射風彈時一次投射8顆風彈，投射的風彈角度額外偏轉-16~16度。
  - Entering `/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_launch_more_wind_charge:0b}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_launch_more_wind_charge:1b}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_launch_more_wind_charge:0b}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_launch_more_wind_charge:1b}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- Breeze will launch a melee attack against a target within 1.5 blocks of the target, dealing 2 damage.│旋風使者會對距離小於1.5格的攻擊目標發動近戰攻擊，造成2點傷害。
  - Entering `/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_melee_attack:0b}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_melee_attack:1b}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_melee_attack:0b}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_melee_attack:1b}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
- When Breeze hits a creature with any attack, it gains one layer of Wind Web, up to a max of 2 layers.│旋風使者透過任何攻擊擊中一個生物時，它會獲得一層風網，最高2層。
   - Wind Net: When the Breeze is damaged, 80% of the damage is reduced, and one layer of Wind Net is consumed.│風網：當該旋風使者受到傷害時，為其減免此次傷害80%的傷害量，同時消耗一層風網。 
  - Entering `/data merge storage hurricane:config {wind_net_max_stacking_layers:<value>}` will set the max of layers in Breeze's wind net to <value> layers, which is 2 by default.│輸入`/data merge storage hurricane:config {wind_net_max_stacking_layers:<value>}`會將旋風使者風網的最高層數設為 <value> 層，預設為2。
- Mobs attacked by Breeze will suffer a 30-second Breeze effect; Breeze restores 1 health when attacking a creature with the Wind Charged effect.│受到旋風使者攻擊的生物會受到30秒蘊風效果；旋風使者攻擊了帶有蘊風效果的生物會恢復1生命。
  - Entering `/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_healing:0b}` will disable this feature; entering `/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_healing:1b}` will enable this feature, which is enabled by default.│輸入`/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_healing:0b}`可將該功能關閉；輸入`/data merge storage hurricane:config {breeze_healing:1b}`可將該功能開啟，預設開啟。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
